summary.Task: There are multiple objects within the scene. Firstly, delete all objects that are not of a sphere. Then, apply a constant velocity to one sphere to make it collide with the other. Output which direction you applied the force in (1 for x direction (+ or -), 2 for y direction (+ or -), and 3 for z direction (+ or -)). After you applied the constant velocity, retrive the position and the center of mass of the sphere you applied the force on after 0.2 real life seconds. Round to the nearest tenth if necessary. Your answer should be a list of 7 integers (1 for the direction, 3 for the position, and the other three for the center of mass)
